---
title: "test_gateway_empire.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_gateway_empire.ts"
loc: 60
complexity: 2
logic_score: 6.38
style_score: 3.94
intel_score: 2.73
overall_score: 4.88
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [beforeEach](file://node:test)
- [afterEach](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [*](file://fastify)
- [*](file://../../src/node/gateway/plugins/corvus.js)
- [*](file://../../src/node/gateway/routes/api/intent.js)
- [*](file://../../src/node/gateway/routes/streams/telemetry.js)

### Exports
- `fastify`
- `response`
- `payload`
- `response`
- `response`
